sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23014" key="gunaikhro/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γῠναικ-ηρός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ά</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n23014.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">γυναικεῖος</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0443.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diocl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γ. τρόπος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.55B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.55B.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
